privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly direct the creation of an OpenToonz scene with standard DCI 2K Scope settings (2048x858 resolution, 24 fps). The scene must be saved at /home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/cinema_short/cinema_short.tnz, and a test render exported to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/cinema_scope_test. The requested frame count of 120 frames accurately reflects 5 seconds of animation at 24 fps. These parameters are fully consistent across the description, the evaluation scripts, and real-world standard formats.
